title: More Menu (Part 2/2)
heading: E-Governance
text:
West Tripura District is the first District to start implementation of the National Standard AEBAS (which is implemented by Govt of India) on such a large scale. AEBAS system provides non-repudiating and accurate record of attendance and has a dashboard with MIS that allows viewing of individual specific record of attendance as may be required. **CSC 2.0 SCHEME:**
Based on the assessment of CSC scheme, the Government launched the CSC 2.0 scheme in August 2015 to expand the outreach of CSCs to all Gram Panchayats across the country. Under CSC 2.0 scheme, at least one CSC will be set up in each Gram Panchayets across the country. Whereas in West Tripura District 80 GPs covered under the scheme. Common Services Centers (CSCs) are strategic cornerstone of the Digital India Program. They are the access points for delivery of various electronic services to villages and rural areas. Village Level Entrepreneur (VLE) is a CSC operator and is key to success of CSC operations. Now VLEs are providing below services in West Tripura District.
